name: 核酸与蛋白合成
subject: biology
domain_name: AS · 细胞与分子 / AS · Cells & Molecules / AS · Cells & Molecules
curriculum_points: 2.2 Carbohydrates and lipids continued Candidates should be able to: 6 describe the breakage of a glycosidic bond in polysaccharides and disaccharides by hydrolysis, with reference to the non-reducing sugar test

2.2 Carbohydrates and lipids Learning outcomes Candidates should be able to: 5 describe the formation of a glycosidic bond by condensation, with reference to disaccharides, including sucrose, and polysaccharides

2.1 Testing for biological molecules Learning outcomes Candidates should be able to: 3 describe and carry out a test to identify the presence of non-reducing sugars, using acid hydrolysis and Benedict’s solution
